headline: RYAAY Expands Alicante Presence With New Routes and Capacity Expansion
summary: Ryanair boosts Alicante capacity 10% for Summer 2026 with three new routes and 40 frequency hikes, and aims to capture leisure demand and scale.

headline: Southwest Cabin Shakeup Tests Revenue Growth And Brand Loyalty Story
summary: Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) announced a major cabin overhaul, including assigned seating and extra legroom options. The airline is adding a new basic economy fare tier alongside its traditional offering. Southwest plans to equip more than 300 aircraft with SpaceX Starlink Wi-Fi by the end of 2026. For an airline long known for open seating and a single cabin product, these changes mark a clear shift in how Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) approaches its core business. The move comes as full...
